title: fragariastrum articulatum
intro: Fragariastrum articulatum, also known as the False Strawberry or Strawberry Bush, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the western United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Fragariastrum articulatum include reducing inflammation, relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Fragariastrum articulatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its numerous health benefits.
